items.title: Russia's Putin declares unilateral Easter ceasefire in Ukraine | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Vladimir Putin announced a surprise one-day ceasefire in Ukraine for Easter, but Kyiv said Russian forces continued artillery fire and called for an extended true halt to hostilities.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #russia #ukraine #russiaukrainewar #vladimirputin #zelensky

items.title: Iran, US task experts to design nuclear deal framework: Tehran | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Iran and the United States agreed to begin drawing up a framework for a potential nuclear deal, Iran's foreign minister said, after talks that a US official described as yielding ‘very good progress’.

items.title: Zoo animals hunt Easter-themed treats
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Animals at Whipsnade Zoo in England were treated to an Easter-themed hunt, as keepers decorated their enclosures with props and boxes for the upcoming holiday.
 
#zoo #animal #easter #ferret #penguin #lemur</article>

items.title: Zamzam camp survivor recounts executions and arson attacks | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Sitting in a crowd of mothers and children under the harsh sun, Najlaa Ahmed described the moment the Rapid Support Forces men poured into Darfur's Zamzam displacement camp, looting and burning homes as shells rained down.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #sudan #zamzamnews #darfur

items.title: Russia jails 19-year-old for condemning Ukraine conflict | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A Russian court handed down a prison sentence of nearly three years to Darya Kozyreva, a young activist who used 19th-century poetry and graffiti to protest the conflict in Ukraine.

items.title: Humanoid robots race humans in a half-marathon in Beijing | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Humanoid robots raced against humans for the first time in a half-marathon in Beijing. One of the robots fell over at the starting line. Another crashed into a railing after running a short distance, causing its human operator to fall over.
#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #Humanoid #Chian

items.title: The Gateadores: a unique Guatemalan tradition for Holy Week | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The Mayan community of San Andrés Sajcabajá in Guatemala celebrated the Holy Week in a unique manner. At a procession of the Gateadores, or crawlers, men with covered faces and crowns and logs with thorns traverse the mile between the community's two temples.
#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #Mayan #Guatemala

items.title: Supreme Court pauses deportations of Venezuelan migrants | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The Supreme Court paused the Trump administration’s plan to deport Venezuelan men in custody, ensuring they receive judicial review. The case could test the balance of power — and spark a constitutional showdown.
#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #SupremeCourt #Trump #US

items.title: New York International Auto Show celebrates its 125th anniversary | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The New York International Auto Show, North America's oldest automotive exhibition, is celebrating its 125th anniversary this year. ‘The New York Auto Show really got things started for the auto industry back in 1900 at the old Madison Square Garden,’ said show president Mark Schienberg.

items.title: West Bank family under pressure as settlers target grazing land | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Fatima Abu Naim, a mother of five, lives in a hillside cave in the occupied West Bank, under increasing pressure from Jewish settlers who, she says, try to steal her family's sheep and come by regularly to tell her and her husband to leave.
#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #israelpalestineconflict #israelisettlers #westbank #gaza #israelhamaswar #israel #palestine

items.title: LIVE: Sean 'Diddy' Combs in court for conference ahead of trial
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Sean 'Diddy' Combs is due in court for a conference ahead of his trial next month.
Combs pleaded not guilty on April 15 to an expanded federal indictment charging the hip-hop mogul with five criminal counts, including racketeering and sex trafficking.

#seandiddycombs #sextrafficking #diddy #trial #legal #live #news #reuters

Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/</article>

items.author: Reuters
items.content:

items.title: Israel strikes dozens of targets in Gaza as ceasefire efforts stall | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Israeli airstrikes hit about 40 targets across the Gaza Strip over the past day, the military said, hours after Hamas rejected an Israeli ceasefire offer that it said fell short of its demand to agree a full end to the war.

#israel #israelhamaswar #gaza #middleeast #middleeastconflict #middleeasttensions #News #Reuters #Newsfeed

items.title: US will abandon Ukraine peace talks if no progress: Rubio - Five stories you need to know | Reuters
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>1. U.S. President Donald Trump will walk away from efforts to broker a Russia-Ukraine peace deal within days unless there are clear signs that a deal can be done, U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio said on Friday.

2. U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday signaled a potential end to the tit-for-tat tariff hikes between the U.S. and China that shocked markets, and that a deal over the fate of social media platform TikTok may have to wait.

3. Police have arrested scores of people in Pakistan in recent weeks after more than 10 mob attacks on outlets of U.S. fast-food chain KFC, sparked by anti-United States sentiment and opposition to its ally Israel's war in Gaza, officials said.

4.  Democratic U.S. Senator Chris Van Hollen met on Thursday with Kilmar Abrego Garcia, the man wrongly deported to El Salvador in a case that has pitted a defiant Trump administration against the courts and fanned the prospect of a constitutional conflict.

5. A mineral called siderite found abundantly in rock drilled by a NASA rover on the surface of Mars is providing fresh evidence of the planet's warmer and wetter ancient past when it boasted substantial bodies of water and potentially harbored life.

#us #russiaukraine #russia #ukraine #russiaukrainewar #marcorubio #trump #donaldtrump #tiktok #uschinaconflict #tariffs #trumptariffs #pakistan #kfc #palestinian #gaza #vanhollen #elsalvador #nasa #mars  #News #Reuters #Newsfeed 

👉  Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/reuterssubscribe
